name: claude-code-management
description: Manage Claude Code customization assets across plugins and marketplaces.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold, iterate, and optimize Claude Code skills
interface.longDescription: Owns the full lifecycle of Claude Code skills in plugin marketplaces: scaffold new skills with dual Claude Code and Codex manifests, iterate on existing ones with eval loops, pressure-test discipline skills, optimize descriptions for triggering accuracy, and extract skills from session workflows.
defaultPrompt: Help me scaffold a new skill in this marketplace
Iterate on this skill until it triggers reliably
Pressure-test this discipline skill before I ship it
Optimize the description for this skill's triggering
Turn this conversation into a reusable skill
